text.title: reliability-architecture Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for reliability-architecture as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Applying retry without circuit breaker on a dependency that is completely down.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Retries amplify load on an already-failing service, accelerating its recovery delay. Circuit breaker must open first to stop retry traffic.

failure-mode.description: Returning an error page for any downstream failure, including non-critical P2/P3 features.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Degrades the entire user experience for a failure in an optional feature. Partial page rendering with degraded components is always preferable for P2/P3.
